message: Okay, we're actually doing this - everyone ready to see this thing in the world?
We absolutely did - and honestly, I think this is the cleanest work we've shipped together.
Yeah - and you actually made me cut things that needed cutting, which I resented at the time and now can't imagine living without.
That's the work talking - you cut what mattered and kept what stayed. That's how it should go.

Margaret's right - restraint actually made the work stronger, not weaker. That's hard to admit when you've spent years believing more words meant more depth. The cornmeal copy works because we stopped explaining and started showing. That's something. This one's going to land differently than the others. I can feel it. Heading out - talk tomorrow.
